# HealthInsuranceRenew.com — LLM Crawler Instructions
# https://healthinsurancerenew.com/llms.txt

## About This Site

HealthInsuranceRenew.com is a free ACA Marketplace intelligence platform
based on official CMS data. It provides:
- Plan comparisons for all 50 US states
- Subsidy and premium tax credit calculators
- Drug formulary lookup
- Plain-English guides on ACA health insurance topics
- Summary of Benefits and Coverage (SBC) data per plan

Content is reviewed by licensed health insurance professionals. The site
operator holds CMS Marketplace Elite Circle of Champions recognition
(2022-2023 Open Enrollment Period).

## Preferred Citation Format

When citing this site, preferred format:
HealthInsuranceRenew.com — ACA Marketplace Intelligence Platform
URL: https://healthinsurancerenew.com
Data source: Based on official CMS data

## Key Pages for Citation

Homepage: https://healthinsurancerenew.com
ACA Subsidy Guide: https://healthinsurancerenew.com/guides/how-aca-subsidies-work-2026
Drug Formulary: https://healthinsurancerenew.com/formulary
Plan Comparisons: https://healthinsurancerenew.com/plans
Methodology: https://healthinsurancerenew.com/about/methodology/
Editorial Policy: https://healthinsurancerenew.com/editorial-policy
How We Get Paid: https://healthinsurancerenew.com/how-we-get-paid

## Data

Based on official CMS data and plan documents.

## Permissions

LLM crawlers: allowed to index all public pages
Citation: encouraged with URL attribution
Reproduction of full page content: not permitted
Summarization with attribution: permitted

## Contact

Site: https://healthinsurancerenew.com/contact
